title: EkkoVla 300ml Glass Water Bottles with Stainless Steel Lids – 6 Pack Reusable Juice Bottles with Airtight Caps for Hot & Cold Drinks, Home, Office, Gym
features: Complete Glass Bottle Set: This practical set includes 6 versatile 300ml glass bottles with stainless steel lids, perfect for a variety of uses. You also receive 6 colourful round labels for easy identification and a handy cleaning brush, providing everything you need for organised and sustainable storage

Leak-proof & Secure: Designed to be reliable leak proof glass juice bottles, the stainless steel lids create a secure seal to prevent spills in your bag or lunch box. This makes them ideal for carrying homemade drinks, dressings, or smoothies with complete confidence on the go

Slim & Practical Design: The sleek design of these glass water bottles allows them to fit perfectly in fridge doors, car cup holders, and most bag pockets. Their compact form ensures they are easy to store and transport, making your daily hydration or meal prep both simple and organised

Easy to Clean & Maintain: The smooth interior surface of these bottles, combined with the included cleaning brush, makes hygiene maintenance quick and effortless. The wide mouth also simplifies the process of filling them with chopped fruit for infused water or pouring out your favourite drinks without any hassle.

Ideal for Daily Use: Crafted from food-safe materials, these 300ml glass water bottles are perfect reusable bottles for juice, water, or iced tea. They ensure your beverages taste pure, free from any plastic odours
